channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising Costs, Climate Risks, and Law Make Home Insurance Increasingly Essential in Nigeria
item.description: For Nigeria today, owning a house no be small achievement at all, as e usually take years of hard work, sacrifice, and planning. But with the way inflation dey rise, building materials dey cost more, ...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV Defends Peace Message Despite Trump’s Criticism
item.description: Pope Leo XIV don talk say e no dey fear President Donald Trump and e get moral duty to speak well against war, especially as Trump dey vex over the pope call for peace for the Middle East. Before Leo ...

item.title: Teen charged as adult in death of Anna Kepner aboard cruise ship
item.description: A 16-year-old boy from Titusville, identified in court records as T.H., has been indicted as an adult by a federal grand jury on charges of first-degree murder and aggravated sexual abuse in connectio...

item.title: Lion Killed by Protective Hippo After Attempted Hunt in Maasai Mara
item.description: The Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) has confirmed the death of an 11-year-old male lion known as Kiminati within the Maasai Mara ecosystem, following a dangerous encounter with a hippopotamus. According ...

item.title: Study shows majority of South African graduates would prefer vocational trades over academic degrees
item.description: A recent international study has found that a significant proportion of South African graduates regret choosing academic degrees over vocational training, with 69% saying they would rather have pursue...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Highlights from Your Face Sounds Familiar: The Grand Showdown

item.title: President Ruto Reaffirms Support for Nyamira Railway Project Amid Public Debate During Gusii Tour
item.description: President William Ruto has strongly defended the ongoing railway development project in Nyamira County during his working tour of the Gusii region. Speaking in Ikonge, the Head of State dismissed crit...

item.title: Kanlaon Volcano records 24 ash emission events amid continued unrest; Alert Level 2 remains
item.description: Kanlaon Volcano on Negros Island continues to show signs of persistent volcanic unrest, according to a report cited by the Office of Civil Defense-Negros Island Region (OCD-NIR). In the first 13 days ...

item.title: Peace highlighted as vital for Tanzania’s steady tourism development
item.description: In Tanzania, the Deputy Minister for Tourism, Mary Masanja Malecela, has emphasized the need for citizens to safeguard national peace and unity, noting that these values are crucial for the ongoing su...

item.title: Trump explains AI image controversy, says it was meant to show him as a doctor
item.description: US President Donald Trump clarified on Monday that the AI-generated image he shared on Truth Social, depicting him as a Jesus-like figure, was intended to show him as a doctor associated with the Red ...

item.title: Russia Offers to Mediate Between US and Iran After Nuclear Talks Collapse
item.description: Ah, so Russia don step up to play peacemaker between America and Iran after their latest attempt at settling their differences chop cross. Dem two countries bin dey try reach agreement on Iran’s nucle...

item.title: Trump Addresses Iran Conflict Amidst Unusual McDonald's Delivery and Press Conference
item.description: President Donald Trump held an impromptu press conference at the White House on Monday, a scene made all the more bizarre by the fact that he had just received a delivery of McDonald’s via DoorDash. D...

item.title: How a US Blockade of Iranian Ports via the Strait of Hormuz Could Impact the Global Economy
item.description: The article explains the potential global economic consequences of a US-imposed blockade on Iranian ports in the context of escalating tensions involving Iran, the United States, and Israel. The Strai...

item.title: Sunetra Pawar Kicks Off Baramati Bypoll Campaign with Tribute to Pawar Senior
item.description: Achcha, so it seems like Sunetra Pawar, the wife of the late Pawar Saab, has officially launched the campaign for the Baramati by-election. From what I can understand, it was quite an emotional affair...

item.title: VP Nchimbi directs new ambassadors to strengthen Tanzania’s economic diplomacy abroad
item.description: Tanzania’s Vice President, Dr Emmanuel Nchimbi, has given strong instructions to the country’s newly appointed ambassadors, telling them to actively promote Tanzania’s national interests in their dipl...

item.title: Kenyan nationals arrested in India over Sh500 million gold smuggling at Mumbai Airport
item.description: Authorities in India have arrested a group of Kenyan nationals following the discovery of a large gold consignment valued at over Sh500 million at Mumbai Airport. According to reports from Indian auth...

item.title: US imposes naval blockade on Iranian shipping as tensions escalate in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States has initiated a naval blockade targeting vessels departing Iranian ports, according to President Donald Trump, who also stated that Iran has indicated a willingness to negotiate a de...

item.title: Researchers Develop 'Giant Superatoms' to Enhance Quantum Computing Stability
item.description: Researchers at Chalmers University of Technology in Sweden have made a significant theoretical breakthrough that could revolutionize quantum computing. They've proposed a novel concept utilizing “gian...

item.title: David Szalay’s Booker Prize novel compared to Kubrick’s Barry Lyndon over plot similarities
item.description: David Szalay, the Booker Prize-winning author of the novel Flesh, has come under scrutiny after critics pointed out notable similarities between his work and Stanley Kubrick’s 1975 film Barry Lyndon. ...

item.title: LTFRB adopts online system for Service Contracting Program applications to speed up processing for PUV operators
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has announced that it will now use an online platform to process applications for the government’s Land-Based Service Contracting Progr...
